rationale: Educ. Code §21.304 governs the commissioner's decision process in teacher contract disputes. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 21.304. DECISION OF COMMISSIONER. (a) The commissioner's decision must be in writing and must include findings of fact and conclusions of law.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns teacher employment dispute resolution and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
